# KDD — Knowledge-Driven Development

> Template repository for the KDD methodology: OKF (Open Knowledge Format)
> for structuring knowledge as markdown + CCDD (Contract-Driven Development)
> for deterministic gates. This page publishes the methodology's own knowledge
> as searchable, verified skills.

## Docs

- [Landing (visual walkthrough)](/index.html)
- [Repository](https://github.com/MauricioPerera/KDD)

<!-- skills-memory: {"snapshot":"/skills-index.snapshot","snapshot_sha256":"1ecccac16a25c7bbbd44c6cf4a2977c40964fc0eca05d0cd818fe01b7a2032ba","format":"minimemory-okf-v1"} -->

## Skills

Skills published by the KDD template - search and browse the methodology's own OKF knowledge bundle (spec, contracts, architecture, validation).

- [search_knowledge](/skills/search_knowledge/SKILL.md): BM25 search over this origin's published knowledge bundle. Use it to find which concept answers a question before fetching it. <!-- skill: {"version":"0.1.0","license":"MIT","sha256":"a093440b30bb81abafc12014a130635b6acc22c608e2dae3914511e058fbde5e","tool":"/skills/search_knowledge/tool.js","tool_sha256":"b13a3c0448c4ee8c744b1ee33b1dd441ecc0c7c3552e23f04b5f9aaf79049ab7"} -->
- [get_concept](/skills/get_concept/SKILL.md): fetch the full markdown of a knowledge concept by id from this origin's bundle. <!-- skill: {"version":"0.1.0","license":"MIT","sha256":"c63b95427c4888b215b476442044d0e8ceeb9e4bd7e15eac7d762c9754988655","tool":"/skills/get_concept/tool.js","tool_sha256":"b02fcb82a7f4d4693dc15b3b3cb07cb98360d26a49b21c546416bd52bf8d9422"} -->
- [list_concepts](/skills/list_concepts/SKILL.md): list every knowledge concept this origin publishes (id, type, title, description). <!-- skill: {"version":"0.1.0","license":"MIT","sha256":"3576ada3394b026b552620b009c8b3d6690995778d0cb63c4ca32fe78e793c19","tool":"/skills/list_concepts/tool.js","tool_sha256":"a7a550914c4eee6d83c444c7ffe9b6c79a41c464559998fb3e80ae417a13d157"} -->
